name: Inngest
description: Event-driven durable execution platform. Send events to trigger serverless functions, manage function runs, and perform bulk cancellations via REST API.

capabilities.name: event_send
capabilities.description: Send one or more events to trigger functions.

capabilities.name: event_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific event by ID.

capabilities.name: event_runs_list
capabilities.description: List all function runs triggered by a specific event.

capabilities.name: function_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific function by ID.

capabilities.name: run_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details and status of a specific function run.

capabilities.name: cancellation_create
capabilities.description: Bulk cancel function runs within a time range.

capabilities.name: app_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific app by ID.
